name: fallow
description: Codebase intelligence for TypeScript and JavaScript using fallow

interface.longDescription: Fallow gives Codex a fast, local static analysis layer for TypeScript and JavaScript. It helps review changed-code risk, find unused code and dependencies, detect duplication and complexity hotspots, inspect architecture boundaries, and prioritize safe cleanup. Fallow Impact also summarizes the latest whole-project issue trend and findings cleared over time.
defaultPrompt: Audit this codebase for changed-code risk and cleanup opportunities.
Review this branch with fallow and prioritize what needs attention.
Show the latest Fallow Impact summary for this project.
